section.title: Projects
section.subtitle: Hands-on work across data analytics, automation, and visualization

categories.label: SQL
categories.description: Data analysis, querying, optimization, and reporting using relational databases.

project.name: Sales Analysis Using SQL
project.summary: Analyzed sales data to identify revenue trends, top-performing products, and regional performance using advanced SQL queries.

projects.problem: Business stakeholders lacked clarity on revenue drivers and regional performance.
projects.solution: Designed complex SQL queries with joins, aggregations, and window functions to extract insights.
projects.impact: Enabled data-driven decisions by highlighting top products and underperforming regions.

categories.label: Python
categories.description: Data analysis, automation, and scripting projects built with Python.

project.name: Data Cleaning Automation
project.summary: Automated data cleaning and preprocessing pipeline using Pandas and NumPy.

projects.problem: Manual data cleaning was time-consuming and error-prone.
projects.solution: Built reusable Python scripts to standardize and preprocess datasets.
projects.impact: Reduced data preparation time and improved data consistency.

categories.label: Excel
categories.description: Advanced Excel dashboards, formulas, and reporting solutions.

project.name: Sales Dashboard in Excel
project.summary: Interactive sales dashboard using Pivot Tables, Power Query, and advanced formulas.

projects.problem: Stakeholders needed quick insights without relying on BI tools.
projects.solution: Built a self-contained Excel dashboard with automated refresh.
projects.impact: Improved accessibility of sales insights for non-technical users.

categories.label: Dashboards
categories.description: Business intelligence dashboards and data visualization projects.

project.name: Business Performance Dashboard
project.summary: End-to-end dashboard visualizing KPIs for business stakeholders.

projects.problem: KPIs were scattered across multiple reports.
projects.solution: Designed a centralized BI dashboard with drill-down capabilities.
projects.impact: Improved executive visibility into business performance.

project.name: Portfolio Website
project.summary: Personal portfolio built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, hosted on GitHub Pages.

projects.problem: Needed a professional, data-driven portfolio to showcase work.
projects.solution: Built a modular, JSON-driven website architecture.
projects.impact: Created a scalable platform to present projects and experience.
